author: tof__
content:
```
Timer Scenarios for Point 3:
- Scenario A: 8 hrs are up and player is offline
- Result: Redistribute immediately regardless of online/offline status and upon their next login they will be auto stripped

- Scenario B: 8 hrs are up and player is online but AFK
- Result: A 30 min grace period will start informing they must go out and defend the title in the arena otherwise auto strip and redistribute

- Scenario C: 8 hrs are up and player is online but NOT AFK
- Result: The system will find a suitable moment to spawn them into the arena and announce to the world (similar to a tournament announce) that registrations are open to battle this G.o.D and they will have 4 mins to register. Randomly chosen player will fight and arena happens as normal.

- G.o.Ds can choose to MANUALLY start their open challenge but only within the last hour of their G.o.D defense timer i.e between 7-8 hour, so that the G.o.D can complete their mandatory challenge should they need to go AFK or be offline allowing some flexibility. This verb can be found in the Channels tab.
- Logging out during a challenge will automatically strip the G.o.D and grant it to the opponent.
- Logging out during a challenge waiting room, will automatically strip the G.o.D and grant it via automatic redistribution.
- ALL G.o.D turnovers and battles will automatically be recorded via Discord Webhook for admin moderation. Including the initial election of G.o.Ds.
- This system has been designed to take out all the manual actions from the old system which had room for loop holes, G.o.D title trading and accept/reject politics. The automated system will now handle everything.```

author: tof__
content:
```
#G.o.D System Changes:
- The G.o.D system has undergone a massive overhaul to move towards a fully automated system. All G.o.Ds will remain as their Leaders when this update is deployed. Below are the changes.
- Accept/Reject Battle Challenges system has been completely removed.
- G.o.D Appointments: G.o.Ds will continue to be elected (initial elections) via G.o.D tournaments which are hosted once every wipe. No changes here.

- G.o.D Turnovers (NEW): G.o.D titles can now turn over in various ways to further promote pvp, diversity and strategy.
 1) Being killed by an NPC will now have a 10% chance for the G.o.D to drop their title, the system will randomly find the next random active players with some active mob kills and assign them as the new G.o.D. If an eligible player is not found, the G.o.D would have 'survived' a turnover and a text will be displayed and logged.
 2) Being killed by a Player or being Hakai'd (not in events/tournaments/arenas) will now have a 20% chance for the G.o.D to drop their title to the Killer and assign them as the new G.o.D.
 3) G.o.Ds who accumulate more than 8 hours of time which includes offline time as a G.o.D, will have to defend their title at least once to reset this time. This will occur automatically and the G.o.D will be sent to the arena and a world ballot will start where rival players can register their names for a chance to battle the G.o.D. The randomly selected player will enter the arena for the fight and the rest of the players will be warped back out and rewarded 15 UP for attempting participation. Should the player be offline and accumulated over 8 hours, the G.o.D system will automatically strip and redistribute the title to another active player randomly.
```

```
#Version 8.67 (NEW WIPE!)
#Benefactor Gift Packages:
- All DBA One Wipe Subbers from last wipe will KEEP their Subs this wipe. (Season Passes will naturally reset as normal)
- All Season Pass & One Wipe Sub players from last wipe will be eligible to claim a one-time one-key Gift Pack.

- This bonus package can be claimed by any player via the Bulma Bunny NPC inside spawn for a limited time!

#Performance & Optimisations:
- NPC Wander Codes have been optimised as it was the most expensive CPU usage proc (Target caching, Reduced scans, Early sleeps when the NPC can’t act, Only run expensive tech logic when near valid target)
- F_damage (visual text damage) code has been rewrote from scratch as it was another super expensive proc. (fewer objects/spawns and less per-hit overhead.)
- Punch verb has been optimised. (Cached the tile in front once - less scanning, Removed redundant checks, Removed Spawn overheads)
- Level Up proc has been optimised. (Process all levels in one call, Move expensive effects out of the loop, batch the display into one summary after the loop instead of per-level output.)```

author: tof__
content:
```
#Combat System Changes:
- Melee damage formula has been revised for both player combat and npc combat
- Offensive attack power will be determined by Strength and Unarmed Skill stats
- Defensive defense power will be determined by Defense and Unarmed Skill stats
- Powerlevel will no longer be included in Melee damage and will be used as strictly Health/Durability
- Final damage will be based off of the attack and defense powers
- Players will no longer do '1' damage when they are significantly weaker than an NPC or Player and instead will have a minimum damage clamp based on their current Strength

- Ki damage formula has been revised
- Homings > Blasts > Bang Attacks > Beams (this is the order of power when it comes to techniques, left having the lowest multi, to right having the highest)
- Based on the tech's classification they will have a damage multi applied to them
- Ki formula has been adjusted in a way that it rewards more damage than Melee formula
- Beams and Bang Attacks if landed successfully will cause daze / slow down effect on the enemy
- Ki Beam functionality has been smoothed out with lesser delays and clunkiness
- Ki Beam Charge attacks have been improved to prevent the charge attacks from getting stuck
- Ki Beam attacks will no longer self damage the user if the user walks into their own beam head
- Ki BBA style attacks will no longer self damage the user if the user walks into their own BBA
- Spirit Bomb technique has been re-added and can be learned via King Kai.

- Fighting styles have been currently disabled until they are reworked into the new damage formula and systems.
- Sword Slash verb has also been disabled for revision.
- Custom Beams, Bombs, Scatters have also been disabled for revision.```
